testimonials.quote: Mark consistently translates complex requirements into clean, maintainable interfaces. He elevated our frontend standards and mentored the team through the React migration.
testimonials.name: Engineering lead

testimonials.quote: From Figma to inbox, Mark ships emails and automations that look on-brand and perform. He's the bridge between creative and marketing ops we needed.
testimonials.name: Marketing director

testimonials.quote: He automated reporting pipelines that cut manual work dramatically. Reliable, detail-oriented, and always focused on measurable outcomes.
testimonials.name: Operations manager
